programme.title: The Last Stop In Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation. 2023. US. Director: Francis Galluppi. Starring: Jim Cummings.

programme.title: The Lost Weekend: A Love Story
programme.desc: Explore the 18-month long relationship between John Lennon and May Pang, assistant turned lover. 2022. USA. Directors: Eve Brandstein, Richard Kaufman, Stuart Samuels.

programme.title: In Flames
programme.desc: After the death of the family patriarch, a mother and daughter's precarious existence is ripped apart by figures from their past. 2023. Pakistan. Director: Zarrar Kahn. Starring: Omar Javaid.

programme.title: I Am The River, The River Is Me
programme.desc: Ned Tapa takes a group on a canoe trip down the Whanganui River, the first river in the world recognised as a legal person. 2024. Netherlands. Director: Petr Lom.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/1. An epidemic of insomnia spreads across Stockholm, and difficult choices must be made. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim S1 E1.

programme.title: Mash Ville
programme.desc: Two cult followers bump into eight strangers in a remote location, triggering a fight for survival. 2024. South Korea. Director: Hwang Wook. Starring: Jeon Sin-hwan, Park Jong-hwan.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: A monk is hired by the king to verify rumours of a necromancer raising plague victims from the dead. 2010. Germany, UK. Director: Christopher Smith. Starring: Eddie Redmayne, Sean Bean.

programme.title: Nothing But The Best
programme.desc: An ambitious businessman hires an unemployed man to tutor him in the life skills which he thinks are necessary to succeed. 1964. UK. Director: Clive Donner. Starring: Alan Bates.

programme.title: The Last Stop In Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation. 2023. US. Director: Francis Galluppi. Starring: Jim Cummings.

programme.title: Ghost Stories: Count Magnus
programme.desc: A travel journalist discovers that Count Magnus may not be resting as peacefully as once thought. 2022. UK. Director: Mark Gatiss. Starring: Jason Watkins, MyAnna Buring.

programme.title: Ghost Stories: Lot No. 249
programme.desc: An Oxford student raises eyebrows as he conducts a study into the mysteries of an ancient burial site. 2023. UK. Director: Mark Gatiss. Starring: Kit Harington, Freddie Fox.

programme.title: Ghost Stories: Woman Of Stone
programme.desc: A newlywed couple move to a new villiage where locals warn of strange occurences in the church at night. 2024. UK. Director: Mark Gatiss. Starring: Celia Imrie, Monica Dolan.

programme.title: A Man And A Woman
programme.desc: A Widow and a Widowers' friendship blooms into romance, but can they overcome their tragic pasts. 1966. France. Director: Claude Lelouch. Starring: Anouk Aimee, Jean-Louis Trintignant.

programme.desc: A young Donald Trump builds his business in the '70s and '80s, mentored by ruthless lawyer Roy Cohn. 2024. Canada. Director: Ali Abbasi. Starring: Sebastian Stan, Jeremy Strong.
